name: Dr. Sarah Mitchell
title: Licensed Clinical Psychologist
insurance: Aetna, Blue Cross Blue Shield, United Healthcare
bio: With over 15 years of experience, Dr. Mitchell specializes in evidence-based treatments for anxiety and depression. She uses CBT and EMDR to help clients build resilience.

name: Dr. James Okonkwo
title: Psychiatrist, MD
bio: Dr. Okonkwo is a board-certified psychiatrist who integrates medication management with therapeutic approaches for comprehensive mental health care.

name: Maria Santos, LCSW
title: Licensed Clinical Social Worker
insurance: Medicaid, Blue Cross Blue Shield, Humana
bio: Maria brings a compassionate, culturally sensitive approach to therapy. She specializes in trauma recovery and helping families navigate difficult transitions.

name: Dr. Kevin Park
title: Clinical Psychologist, PhD
bio: Dr. Park is recognized for his expertise in OCD treatment using ERP therapy. He creates a supportive environment where clients can confront and overcome intrusive thoughts.

name: Taylor Rivera, LPC
title: Licensed Professional Counselor
bio: Taylor provides a safe, affirming space for individuals navigating identity, relationships, and personal growth. They use person-centered and narrative therapy approaches.

name: Dr. Lisa Chen
title: Psychiatrist, MD
insurance: Blue Cross Blue Shield, Aetna, Medicare
bio: Dr. Chen combines psychiatric expertise with holistic wellness strategies. She has extensive experience treating eating disorders and co-occurring mood conditions.

name: Marcus Johnson, LMFT
title: Licensed Marriage & Family Therapist
specialties: Family Conflict, Relationship Issues, Stress Management
bio: Marcus is passionate about strengthening family bonds and improving communication. He uses Gottman Method and EFT to help couples and families thrive.

name: Dr. Amira Hassan
title: Licensed Clinical Psychologist
bio: Dr. Hassan is a trauma specialist who works with survivors of violence, displacement, and complex PTSD. She provides culturally responsive, evidence-based care.

name: Chris Nguyen, LPC
title: Licensed Professional Counselor
insurance: Blue Cross Blue Shield, Medicaid, Humana
bio: Chris specializes in addiction recovery and dual-diagnosis treatment. He uses motivational interviewing and relapse prevention strategies to support lasting change.

name: Dr. Emily Foster
title: Clinical Psychologist, PsyD
bio: Dr. Foster helps adults and adolescents with ADHD develop practical strategies for focus, organization, and emotional regulation in daily life.

name: Roberto Alvarez, LCSW
title: Licensed Clinical Social Worker
bio: Roberto provides compassionate grief counseling and family therapy. He draws from his bilingual, bicultural background to connect with diverse communities.

name: Dr. Rachel Goldstein
title: Psychiatrist, MD
insurance: Aetna, Blue Cross Blue Shield, Medicare
bio: Dr. Goldstein is a compassionate psychiatrist specializing in mood disorders. She believes in collaborative treatment planning and empowering patients in their recovery.

name: Jordan Blake, LMFT
title: Licensed Marriage & Family Therapist
insurance: Cigna, United Healthcare, Out of Pocket
bio: Jordan creates a warm, non-judgmental space for individuals and couples to explore patterns, improve communication, and build stronger connections.

name: Dr. Priya Sharma
title: Licensed Clinical Psychologist
insurance: Blue Cross Blue Shield, Aetna, Medicaid
bio: Dr. Sharma integrates trauma-informed care with addiction treatment. Her holistic approach addresses root causes while building coping skills for sustainable recovery.

name: Alex Moreno, LPC
title: Licensed Professional Counselor
bio: Alex helps clients manage anxiety and OCD through exposure therapy and mindfulness techniques. He is dedicated to making mental health support accessible to all.

name: Dr. Naomi Williams
title: Clinical Psychologist, PhD
bio: Dr. Williams helps clients navigate depression and life changes with warmth and insight. She uses integrative therapy to support emotional healing and personal growth.
